name: BillDesk
description: Indian payment aggregator supporting 150+ payment methods with recurring payment solutions, tokenization and cross-border payments.

seo.title: BillDesk — Payment Gateway / PSP
seo.meta_description: BillDesk: Indian payment aggregator supporting 150+ payment methods with recurring payment solutions, tokenization and cross-border payments.

when_to_use: UPI, net banking, and card payment acceptance for Indian e-commerce
Recurring billing for subscription services targeting India market
Tokenization for card-on-file repeat purchases in Indian checkout
Cross-border payment collection for global businesses with Indian customers

review.verdict: Trusted enterprise Indian gateway with deep method coverage, but startups often prefer Razorpay's developer experience.
review.best_for: Indian enterprises, banks, and utilities needing broad local method coverage
review.not_for: Indian startups wanting modern, self-serve developer experience
